tasks.prompt: Run a PGx report with sample 23andMe data and save the results to the outputs folder.
Do differential expression on sample RNA-seq counts and save the results to the outputs folder.
Run SuSiE fine-mapping on sample GWAS summary stats and save the results to the outputs folder.
Compare sample genome with George Church PGP-1 and save the comparison report to the outputs folder.
Calculate epigenetic age from sample methylation data and save the results to the outputs folder.
Find protocols for RNA extraction and Western blot and save the protocol details to the outputs folder.
I'd like to detect archaic introgression segments in a modern human genome using the demo data. Run the analysis and write the results to the outputs folder.
Detect and count cells in the sample fluorescence microscopy image, then save the detection results and annotated image to the outputs folder.
Run shotgun metagenomics profiling on the sample data to identify microbial taxa and antimicrobial resistance genes. Save the taxonomy report and abundance tables to the outputs folder.
Extract numerical data from the sample scientific figure image and save the extracted values and visualization to the outputs folder.
Create rich visualizations from differential expression results using the sample data — volcano plots, heatmaps, MA plots. Save everything to the outputs folder.
I have a photo of my medication and my 23andMe genetic data. Generate a personalised pharmacogenomic dosage card from the demo data and save it to the outputs folder.
Compute HEIM diversity and equity metrics from the sample genomic data and save the full equity report to the outputs folder.
Score genetic compatibility between male and female genomes across HLA, blood type, and ancestry markers using the bundled genome data. Save the compatibility report to the outputs folder.
Perform HLA typing from the sample genotype data and save the typing results to the outputs folder.
Run Mendelian randomisation analysis to test for causal relationships using the sample instruments data. Save all MR results and sensitivity plots to the outputs folder.
Aggregate QC reports from multiple samples into a unified MultiQC report and save it to the outputs folder.
Generate a unified personal genomic profile report from the sample patient data, covering ancestry, pharmacogenomics, disease risk, and traits. Save the report to the outputs folder.
Simulate offspring genomes from a pair of parent genomes via meiotic recombination using the bundled genome data. Save the simulated offspring genotypes and crossover maps to the outputs folder.
Run sequence quality control and alignment on the sample FASTQ data, then save the QC metrics and alignment stats to the outputs folder.
Compile the bundled SOUL character profiles into synthetic genome representations and save the output genomes to the outputs folder.
Score and rank drug targets based on evidence from the sample target data. Save the validation report and score tables to the outputs folder.
Build a knowledge graph from the sample cohort data and run a few queries to explore relationships. Save the graph and query results to the outputs folder.
Generate a clinical report from whole exome sequencing data using the sample configuration, in English. Save the report to the outputs folder.
Annotate the sample VCF variants with gene consequences, ClinVar significance, and population frequencies. Save the annotated VCF and summary to the outputs folder.
Classify germline variants from the sample VCF according to ACMG guidelines and generate a clinical variant report. Save the report to the outputs folder.
Search for Galaxy tools suitable for RNA-seq quality control and recommend a workflow. Save the tool recommendations to the outputs folder.
Import and parse a DRAGEN result bundle from the demo data to extract QC metrics, variant calls, and coverage stats. Save the parsed report to the outputs folder.
Browse my electronic lab notebook to find recent experiments and protocols using the demo data. Save the experiment listing to the outputs folder.
Predict the 3D structure of trp-cage miniprotein using Boltz with the demo configuration. Save the predicted structure and confidence plots to the outputs folder.
Generate a personalised nutrition report based on my genetic data from the sample genotype file. Save the nutrition report to the outputs folder.
